fields.name: fileId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the overdraft usage report file, formatted as ODU-YYYYMMDD-NNN

fields.name: fileName
fields.description: Human-readable name of the source CSV file containing overdraft usage data

fields.name: sentDate
fields.description: Timestamp when the overdraft usage record was transmitted from Accounts to Credit department

fields.name: fromDepartment
fields.description: Originating department sending the overdraft usage data

fields.name: toDepartment
fields.description: Receiving department consuming the overdraft usage data for credit assessment and monitoring

fields.name: accountNumber
fields.description: Unique account identifier for which overdraft usage is being reported

fields.name: overdraftLimit
fields.description: Maximum overdraft facility amount authorized for the account, expressed in the account's base currency

fields.name: overdraftUsed
fields.description: Current amount of overdraft facility drawn or utilized by the account holder

fields.name: usagePercent
fields.description: Percentage of authorized overdraft limit currently in use, calculated as (overdraftUsed / overdraftLimit) × 100

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-text commentary from Accounts department providing context, risk assessment, or recommended actions for the Credit department
